transfers.rationale: Sim Lab ranks him last (xPts 3.38). Medical Bay/News Desk flag doubtful (75%). Market Desk confirms -140k net out, cost_change -0.1 — price drop near-certain. EO collapsing (~28%). Sell before deadline.

Fixture Room rank 1 (weighted 2.2, home FDR 2). Nailed 100%. Primary set-piece + pen taker. Sim Lab xPts 6.58 with best differential ceiling at 14.2%. Market Desk flags imminent +0.1 rise — buy before it locks.

captain.rationale: Unanimous across pillars. Sim Lab rank 1 (EV 16.41, haul 31.6%). Intel EO ~120%+ — not captaining him is the single biggest rank risk. Fixture Room home FDR 2. Non-negotiable armband.

vice_captain.rationale: Sim Lab rank 2 (EV 15.03). Most assured starter (36 starts, 3200 mins). Best VC behind Haaland.

chip.rationale: CHIP-CAL: HOLD. No DGW/BGW in GW38. Bench Boost and Free Hit lose structural edge. TC tempting on Haaland but single FDR-2 home tie is not TC-grade ceiling. Bank chips.

top_risks.risk: Gabriel late team-news: EO collapsing to ~28% so non-ownership damage shrinking. Execute OUT before price drop.
top_risks.mitigation: Sell before tonight's deadline. Do not chase him back.

top_risks.risk: End-of-season rotation: Rogers and Mateta face possible squad rest.
top_risks.mitigation: Bringing in Mbeumo (nailed 100%). Check lineups 1h before deadline.

top_risks.risk: Captain concentration on Haaland — blank caps the week.
top_risks.mitigation: VC Salah locked. Monitor MCI team news 1h pre-deadline.

pillar_insights.fdr_x: Clean GW38, no DGW/BGW. Best runs: Mbeumo (2.2, home FDR 2), Haaland (2.4, home FDR 2). Salah worst fixture (away FDR 3) but stays on form/minutes.
pillar_insights.wrppm_5d: 10k-sim ranking: Haaland 8.2 xPts / 16.41 capt EV / 31.6% haul; Salah 7.52 / 15.03 VC; Mbeumo 6.58 top differential ceiling. Gabriel last at 3.38 — reinforces OUT.
pillar_insights.price_vel: SELL Gabriel (near-certain -0.1 drop). BUY Mbeumo before +0.1 rise. Haaland and Rogers also rising; Salah/Mateta stable.
pillar_insights.elite_own: Haaland must-own AND must-captain (EO ~120%+). Gabriel fading template — acceptable to exit. Mbeumo near-differential with pens/set-pieces. Rogers (4.1%) max-leverage punt.

weekly_brief_summary: GW38 final-week plan: sell Gabriel (all pillars agree — doubt + price drop + EO collapse), buy Mbeumo (best fixture, nailed, set-piece, rising price). Captain Haaland (EV 16.41, haul 31.6%, EO ~120%+); VC Salah. No chip — clean non-DGW slate, no chip value-positive. Top watch: Gabriel/Haaland confirmed lineups 1h before deadline.
